case_title: WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. vs. WOOD, JOSEPH H. et al

docket_entries.description: LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 02, MOTION FOR ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE, CALENDAR OF APR-04-1995 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE - DISCHARGED, NO CONTEMPT. COURT FINDS SUMMARY JUDGMENT WAS FILED BY PLAINTIFF RELYING ON RECEIPT OF A NON-FILED ANSWER BY DEFENDANT; IN VIEW OF NO ANSWER BEING FILED PLAINTIFF SHOULD SEEK DEFAULT JUDGMENT; $250.00 IN SANCTIONS IS RESCINDED.

AMENDED LAW AND MOTION, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, DENIED COURT RELYING ON PLTFS COUNSEL LETTER NOW MODIFIES ITS 3/1/ 95 ORDER & IMPOSES $250.00 SANCTIONS AGAINST PLTF COUNSEL PAYABLE TO CLERK OF COURT ON 4/13/95. ALTERNATIVELY, COURT SETS APRIL 13, 1995 @ 9AM, DEPT. 2 AS THE TIME & PLACE FOR HEARING WHY SANCTIONS NOT BE AFFIRMED.(PLS SEE MINUTE ORDER)
